intro.valueStatement: I build AI-powered systems that solve real-world hiring and automation problems using full-stack engineering.
intro.proofLine: Built Hire_OS — an AI-powered recruitment system for end-to-end hiring workflows.

finale.headline: Let's build something impactful together.
